name: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp.
description: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. is a gold-focused streaming and royalty company with a diversified portfolio of 80 assets—including 9 streams and 71 royalties—spanning the Americas and Australia, with interests in 15 producing mines and 65 development and exploration stage projects. Listed on both the TSX and NYSE under the ticker TFPM, the company provides investors with precious metals exposure and lower operational risk relative to direct mining operators.
